violations.text: There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: 1. Walk-in cooler (produce) door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. 2. Table in the meat preparation area was in poor repair, observed rust throughout. 3. Shelving in the deli area was in poor repair, inspector observed missing components and exposed wood. 4. Walk-in cooler (produce) was in poor repair, observed dripping condensate. 5. The faucet on the prep sink in the kitchen was in poor repair, observed being held together with tape. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The wall behind 3 bay sink in the bakery area has an accumulation of black and brown residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

Non-functional equipment (can opener, dishwasher) were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Baby formula was observed with an expired date mark (2/1/2023). See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024

The door to the outside, located in the following areas, are not tight-fitting. 1. Back door (dry storage) 2. Receiving dock Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects in bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024
The following gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. 1. Walk-in cooler (prepared foods) 2. Walk-in cooler (produce) New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the following: 1. Mixer table (bakery area) 2. Prep table (produce area) Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2024

Observed floor junctures in the meat cold room and produce area to be in poor repair, with improper seal. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the bakery and meat preparation area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2024
